title: user_registration_with_valid_data
description: Test the POST /api/auth/register endpoint with valid user data including optional fields to ensure successful registration, receiving a 201 status with user id and JWT token.

title: user_login_with_valid_credentials
description: Test the POST /api/auth/login endpoint with valid email and password to verify successful login and receipt of a JWT token.

title: get_authenticated_user_profile
description: Test the GET /api/auth/me endpoint with a valid JWT token to retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

title: symptom_analysis_with_and_without_authentication
description: Test the POST /api/symptoms/check endpoint with symptoms data both with and without JWT token to verify local analysis and optional n8n AI enrichment, including fallback behavior when n8n is unavailable.

title: get_symptom_check_history_authenticated_user
description: Test the GET /api/symptoms/history endpoint with a valid JWT token to retrieve the authenticated user's symptom check history.

title: list_doctors_with_filters_and_without_filters
description: Test the GET /api/doctors endpoint with specialty and city filters as well as without filters to verify correct listing and ordering of doctors, including handling of non-existent specialties.

title: get_doctor_profile_by_id
description: Test the GET /api/doctors/:id endpoint with a valid doctor id to retrieve detailed doctor profile information.

title: book_appointment_with_conflict_detection
description: Test the POST /api/appointments endpoint with valid appointment data and JWT token to create a new appointment, verify conflict detection prevents double booking, and confirm asynchronous n8n webhook triggering with graceful degradation.

title: list_user_appointments
description: Test the GET /api/appointments/my endpoint with a valid JWT token to retrieve the list of appointments for the authenticated user.

title: cancel_appointment_and_verify_status_update
description: Test the PUT /api/appointments/:id/cancel endpoint with a valid JWT token to cancel an existing appointment and verify the status update is reflected in subsequent appointment listings.
